meta.phase: STEP 2 — roles 拡張 (access_predicate_expr 付与)

roles.name: Account Owner
roles.description: アカウント所有者・課金責任者・全権限。Build-Factory では `accounts.owner_user_id = auth.uid()` または `account_members.role = 'owner'` で判定
roles.user_persona: 高本まさと (Build-Factory CEO / 1 人会社) と外部受託先 SaaS 契約者

roles.name: Workspace Admin
roles.description: WS 管理者・編集 / 削除 / 招待 / 権限変更可（攻め）
roles.user_persona: 内部 PM / クライアント側 IT 責任者

roles.name: Contributor
roles.description: 開発担当・編集 / 実行 / 承認（PR）/ 閲覧
roles.user_persona: 開発者 / 内部 Dev / 外部委託

roles.name: Viewer
roles.description: 閲覧のみ・コメント不可
roles.user_persona: オブザーバー (経営層 read-only / 監査人)

roles.name: Client
roles.description: 受託案件発注者・visible_tabs ON/OFF 制限版・コメント可
roles.user_persona: Build-Factory が回す受託案件のクライアント側担当者

roles.name: Monitor
roles.description: 監視担当・全閲覧 + 承認専門（守り）・編集 / 削除 / 招待は不可
roles.user_persona: QA / セキュリティ責任者 / 監査担当

role_relationship: completely_parallel (admin = 攻め / monitor = 守り / 1 user に複数付与可・custom_permissions は OR 評価)

object_constraints.name: account_owner_strip_prevention
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: NOT (role = 'owner' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account_members WHERE account_id = OLD.account_id AND role = 'owner') = 1)
object_constraints.rationale: account_owner は剥奪不可（最後の owner を消すと account が孤児化）。owner 移譲が先に必要

object_constraints.name: self_permission_strip_block
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: NOT (user_id = auth.uid()::text AND OLD.role = 'admin' AND NEW.role != 'admin' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_members WHERE workspace_id = OLD.workspace_id AND role = 'admin') = 1)
object_constraints.rationale: self-permission strip は他 admin が居なければ block（workspace を admin-less にしない）

object_constraints.name: workspace_admin_zero_prevention
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: NOT (OLD.role = 'admin' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workspace_members WHERE workspace_id = OLD.workspace_id AND role = 'admin') = 1)
object_constraints.rationale: workspace 内に admin が 0 になることを禁止

object_constraints.name: monitor_readonly_enforcement
object_constraints.rationale: monitor は edit / delete / invite_member 不可。RLS + custom_permissions OR 評価で deny を強制

object_constraints.name: client_visible_tabs_only
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: user_id = auth.uid()::text AND workspace_id IN (SELECT workspace_id FROM workspace_members WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text AND role = 'client' AND visible_tabs ? CURRENT_TAB)
object_constraints.rationale: client は visible_tabs に含まれないタブの API エンドポイント全 403

object_constraints.name: viewer_edit_override_warning
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: user_id = auth.uid()::text AND (custom_permissions->>'edit_spec')::boolean IS DISTINCT FROM TRUE
object_constraints.rationale: viewer に edit_* 権限を override で付与した場合は警告（一貫性チェック）

object_constraints.name: monitor_admin_combination
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: user_id = auth.uid()::text AND (role = ANY(ARRAY['admin','monitor']) OR custom_permissions ?| ARRAY['admin','monitor'])
object_constraints.rationale: monitor + admin の両方を 1 user に付与可（OR 評価で攻め+守りを兼任）

object_constraints.name: account_member_select
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: owner_user_id = auth.uid()::text OR id IN (SELECT account_id FROM account_members WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)
object_constraints.rationale: 所属メンバーのみ自分の account を読める

object_constraints.name: account_owner_update_only
object_constraints.rationale: account 編集は owner のみ（billing / plan 等）

object_constraints.name: workspace_member_select
object_constraints.rationale: workspace_members 経由 + AC-4 OPTIONAL: account_owner はクロス workspace 読み取り可

object_constraints.name: workspace_scoped_full_access
object_constraints.rationale: workspace 配下の主要 entity は workspace_members に居れば read/write 可（role による細分は custom_permissions OR 評価で実施）

object_constraints.name: knowledge_visibility_select
object_constraints.access_predicate_expr: visibility = 'public' OR (visibility IN ('account_shared','member_shared') AND account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM account_members WHERE user_id = (auth.jwt() ->> 'sub'))) OR (visibility = 'private' AND owner_user_id = (auth.jwt() -> 'user_metadata' ->> 'slug')) OR (visibility = 'ai_only' AND account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM account_members WHERE user_id = (auth.jwt() ->> 'sub')))
object_constraints.rationale: knowledge_base は visibility 列で 4 段階アクセス制御（public/account_shared/private/ai_only）

object_constraints.name: user_self_only
object_constraints.rationale: 認証関連 entity は本人のみ read/write 可

object_constraints.name: audit_log_member_read
object_constraints.rationale: audit / conversation / approval / review は workspace member 全員が SELECT 可（monitor 守り役の前提）

object_constraints.name: service_role_bypass
object_constraints.rationale: service_role (backend trusted code) は全 record アクセス可（AC-3 STATE: trusted backend code のみ）

object_constraints.name: legacy_table_lockdown
object_constraints.rationale: legacy single-user table は scope 列を持たず authenticated 不可（service_role 専用ロックダウン）。multi-tenant 化は別 migration で対応

object_constraints.name: workspace_invitation_member_read
object_constraints.rationale: workspace_invitations は同一 ws の member が SELECT 可（client は visible_tabs で更に絞る）

rls_design_summary: 全テーブルに workspace_id NOT NULL + RLS で workspace_members 経由の所属チェック + custom_permissions JSONB でロール default + 個別 override を OR 評価。helper: bf_can_access_workspace(ws_id) / bf_is_account_owner(acc_id) (SECURITY DEFINER) で predicate を一元化。
